channel.title: BimaNiti — Insurance & Market Insights
channel.description: Analysing markets, decoding insurance, and sharing insights that matter.

item.title: Bima Sugam Countdown: What to Expect as Full Launch Nears
item.description: Bima Sugam's full transactional launch is expected by end-September 2026. The zero-commission digital marketplace could reshape insurance distribution in India. Here's what policyholders and insurers should watch for.

item.title: IRDAI Seeks Comments on Rs 800 Crore Policyholders' Education and Protection Fund Regulations
item.description: IRDAI issued a consultation paper on the proposed regulatory framework for the Rs 800 crore Policyholders' Education and Protection Fund, seeking stakeholder comments by July 13, 2026.

item.title: ICICI Lombard Q1 FY27: Fire Losses, Motor Reserves, and the Profit Squeeze
item.description: ICICI Lombard's Q1 profit slumped 46% as large fire claims and the Supreme Court's Motor TP verdict hit earnings. We analyse whether this is a one-off or a warning sign for India's largest private general insurer.

item.title: GST ITC Impact on Insurers: 10 Months On
item.description: Ten months after the GST exemption on health insurance, the input tax credit (ITC) loss is unevenly distributed — Niva Bupa absorbed ~4%, Star Health ~1%, and Care Health ~2%. Net customer benefit stands at 12-15%.

item.title: Life Insurance Sector Begins FY27 with 16.6% NBP Growth
item.description: India's life insurance sector began FY27 with robust new business premiums growing 16.6%, with private insurers significantly outpacing the market and increasing their share to nearly 40%.

item.title: ICICI Lombard Q1 FY27: Profit Slumps 46% on Large Fire Claims, Motor TP Verdict
item.description: ICICI Lombard reported a 46% YoY decline in Q1 FY27 net profit to Rs 403 crore, hit by large fire insurance claims and increased motor TP reserves following a Supreme Court verdict.

item.title: HDFC Life & ICICI Pru Q1 FY27: Double-Digit Profit Growth
item.description: HDFC Life reported Q1 FY27 PAT of Rs 611 crore (+12%), while ICICI Pru posted PAT of Rs 386 crore (+27.8%), with retail protection APE surging 60.4%.

item.title: Standalone Health Insurers Surge 30.9% in June
item.description: Standalone health insurers posted 30.9% YoY growth in June 2026 premiums, with Care Health leading at 41.9% growth and market share reaching 16.1%.

item.title: Non-Life Insurance June 2026: Growth Accelerates to 16%
item.description: June 2026 GDPI hit Rs 24,195 crore, up 15.9% YoY. Standalone health insurers led the charge at 30.9% growth, with Care (+41.9%) and Niva (+34.3%) posting exceptional numbers.

item.title: IRDAI Set to Review Third-Party Motor Insurance Rates
item.description: IRDAI is set to conduct its first major review of third-party motor insurance rates in years, as insurers face heavy underwriting losses in the segment.

item.title: Non-Life Premiums Grow 16% in June, Highest in 5 Months
item.description: Non-life insurance GDPI grew 15.9% in June 2026 to Rs 24,195 crore, the highest monthly growth in five months, with SAHIs leading at 30.9%.

item.title: Travel Insurance in India: Rising Adoption and Changing Patterns
item.description: Travel insurance adoption in India grew 22% year-on-year in 2026. Non-medical claims dominate at 4:1, senior traveler share hit 22%, and under-18 purchases surged 56%.

item.title: Travel Insurance Adoption Up 22% in 2026
item.description: Travel insurance adoption rose 22% YoY in 2026, with 40% of travellers choosing emerging destinations and non-medical claims outnumbering medical 4:1.

item.title: Home Insurance: India's Biggest Protection Gap
item.description: Only 1 in 20 Indian households has any form of home insurance. With reconstruction costs at Rs 1,200-1,500 per square foot and 5,000+ fire cases annually in Mumbai alone, the protection gap is enormous.

item.title: EV Insurance in India: The Complete Guide
item.description: EV policy issuance surged 670% between FY25 and FY26, yet electric vehicles remain barely 1% of India's insured fleet. Premiums are 20-40% higher than petrol equivalents. Here's why, and what's changing.

item.title: EV Policy Issuance Surges 670% in FY26
item.description: Electric vehicle insurance policy issuance surged 670% between FY25 and FY26, though EVs remain barely 1% of the insured vehicle fleet.

item.title: LIC Q4 FY26 Deep Dive: Record Profit, Surging VNB, and the Margin Story
item.description: LIC reported a record Rs 57,419 crore PAT for FY26 with VNB surging 42%. A deep dive into the performance of India's largest life insurer.

item.title: ICICI Lombard FY26: Health-Led Growth Story Gains Momentum
item.description: ICICI Lombard's Q4 GDPI surged 18.2% — nearly double the industry rate — driven by retail health insurance growing 54%.

item.title: Health Insurance Trends Reshaping India in 2026
item.description: Health insurance premiums grew 14.41% in FY26 driven by GST exemption and rising healthcare awareness.

item.title: SBI Life FY26: Steady Growth, Margin Resilience, and Distribution Strength
item.description: SBI Life delivered 20% NBP growth with VNB margins at 27.5% — the upper end of guidance. A detailed analysis of the insurer's FY26 performance.
